derived.causal_summary: Ran a verify-first batch fix over a fresh 20 scouted targets from the second scout (batches 1 and 2 covered the first 25): 20 parallel gpt-5.5-fast confirm deep-dives classified each headline (7 CONFIRMED, 9 partial-but-real, 4 REFUTED — gemini-compact already calls sanitizeRecoveredPayload internally; 3 code-graph regex lastIndex claims where the while-exec loop resets correctly). 1 partial EXCLUDED from auto-fix (council scoreVerdictProgression — its fix would change stop-policy, a product decision; flagged not fixed). 12 implement-and-test agents fixed the rest across 23 files (sources + added regression tests), fixing only the REAL part of each partial. Spans code-graph stress test tmpdir isolation (os.tmpdir() + scoped chdir+restore; 45 tests pass), convergence INPUT_VALIDATION on missing --round-id, devin handleCompact full compact recovery lifecycle, install script corrections, mk-spec-memory-launcher TOCTOU-safe lock reclaim via rename-before-delete, _utils.sh full semver compare, vector-index orphan row cascade, memory-search community gating + quality score, agent doc live filenames, deep-ai-council live asset reference, and checkpoint schema v30 fixture. Every diff reviewed; comment-hygiene clean; system-spec-kit npm run build exit 0; launcher + convergence .cjs node --check OK; each fix's regression test passes. First attempt failed (Opus 0-token blip); Sonnet retry succeeded.
